overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a continuous walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The camera moves from an upscale indoor lounge through a covered commercial corridor, transitions to an elevated outdoor walkway overlooking the street, and finally descends to street level in a dense urban commercial district with massive holographic billboards and the prominent SECHO corporate signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: upscale lounge with neon accent walls

events.description: camera moves away from standing character and enters commercial corridor

agents.ego_description: moving through an upscale indoor lounge area toward a corridor exit

notable_agents.action: female character in patterned dress standing near neon wall, then left behind as camera advances

entered.detail: grid of illuminated green and yellow square panels covering the wall
curved bar counter with patrons seated on stools
highly polished dark marble floor reflecting neon lights

segments.scene_description: The clip opens in an upscale indoor lounge bathed in green and yellow neon light. A female character stands near a wall of illuminated panels while the camera moves forward across reflective marble flooring toward a corridor entrance, leaving the lounge area behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with luxury storefronts

events.description: passing other pedestrians walking in same direction through corridor
approaching exit to outdoor elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through enclosed corridor lined with advertisements and planters

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead in the corridor

entered.detail: large glowing purple and pink advertisement poster for 'FASHION' on left wall
rectangular white planters containing tall palm trees
cyan neon light strips framing doorways and ceiling edges
large illuminated billboard showing fashion mannequins and 'FERUID' text

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds through a long enclosed commercial corridor with reflective floors and cyan neon trim. Large holographic advertisements line the walls between white planters containing palm trees. Sparse pedestrian traffic moves in the same direction as the camera approaches the corridor exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway overlooking city street

events.description: exiting indoor corridor onto outdoor elevated balcony with city view
descending stairs to lower section of elevated walkway
turning corner to reveal main street intersection with heavy advertising

agents.ego_description: walking down stairs and along elevated outdoor walkway overlooking traffic below

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket descending stairs ahead of camera

entered.detail: transparent glass and metal safety railing overlooking the street
large vertical billboard with DYNALAR text and hand imagery
massive curved digital billboard displaying KIROSHI optics advertisement
large palm tree in square illuminated planter on walkway

segments.scene_description: Exiting the corridor, the scene opens to an elevated outdoor walkway with glass railings overlooking the city street below. The camera descends stairs past a DYNALAR advertisement while massive digital billboards for KIROSHI dominate the skyline. Palm trees in illuminated planters line the walkway as the camera turns to reveal the bustling intersection ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with heavy advertising

events.description: descending to street level from elevated walkway
green sports car driving past on the wet street
approaching large illuminated SECHO corporate signage

agents.ego_description: walking along city sidewalk at street level, passing illuminated billboards and storefronts

notable_agents.action: green sports car driving along the street past the camera position

entered.detail: large illuminated corporate sign reading SECHO with red circular logo
rain-slicked street surface reflecting neon lights from billboards
multiple tiers of illuminated advertisements on building facade
illuminated traffic signals showing green light

segments.scene_description: Now at street level, the camera walks along the sidewalk past the prominent SECHO corporate sign towering overhead. The wet asphalt reflects the myriad neon lights from stacked digital billboards lining the street. A green sports car drives past on the road as the camera continues through the dense commercial district, surrounded by towering glass buildings covered in advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded, upscale indoor lounge into the overwhelming scale of a neon-drenched futuristic city. It begins in a room bathed in green and yellow light, gliding across reflective marble floors past a female character before passing through a corridor entrance. As the camera proceeds, the environment shifts into a long enclosed commercial hallway defined by cyan neon trim, holographic advertisements, and palm trees in white planters. The scene then opens onto an elevated outdoor walkway with glass railings, where the camera descends stairs past a DYNALAR sign and under the gaze of massive KIROSHI billboards. Finally, the movement reaches street level, transitioning onto wet asphalt that reflects a canopy of towering glass buildings and digital advertisements, passing a prominent SECHO corporate sign as a green sports car drives by.
